name: Restart Backend Dev Server
description: Manually triggered hook to kill any process on port 3001 and remind the user to restart the backend dev server

then.command: echo '--- Checking port 3001 ---' && netstat -ano | findstr :3001 || echo 'Port 3001 is free' && echo '' && echo 'Run this to start the backend:' && echo '  cd backend && npm run dev'
